About Me

Passionate educator nurturing young minds for over a decade

At 35 years old, I am a passionate educator with a strong foundation in academia. My journey in teaching is backed by a Bachelor of Science and Bachelor of Education in Science and Mathematics, along with a Master of Science in Physics.

With over a decade of teaching experience in both private and governmental institutions, I've worked with students from Primary to Higher grades. I see education as a journey of self-improvement, emphasizing conceptual understanding and skill development.

I believe in learning through practice and testing to build confidence and thrive in a competitive environment. Interacting with students brings me immense joy!
